steps.t: Khagâmi is tired from her travels west through An Shêru, and is ready to settle in for the night. Together, you have set up a camp-fire and made yours…
While you and Khagâmi were talking at the camp-fire, you both heard a suspicious sound from the east. You should investigate what it was.
You received some unexpected help while defending your camp. You should talk to Faeron.
